hero.title: The People Behind Healio.
hero.quote1: I founded Healio because I am convinced that every person deserves access to first-class healthcare — regardless of their insurance status.
hero.quote2: After years in the traditional insurance industry, it became clear to me: the system is too complicated, often non-transparent, and rarely puts people first.
hero.quote3: With Healio, we set out to change that. We created a platform that untangles complex health insurance plans and offers clear, honest solutions. No incomprehensible clauses, no false promises. Simply excellent healthcare that truly makes a difference in everyday life.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These four pillars form the foundation of our daily work and our vision for the future of health.
values.transparencyDesc: No hidden costs, no surprises. We communicate honestly and openly.
values.trustDesc: Over 120 partner practices and thousands of satisfied customers trust Healio.
values.innovationDesc: We are digitizing healthcare and making it easier than ever before.
values.humanityDesc: Behind every policy is a person. We never forget that.

social.title: Success That Gives Back.
social.text1: We deeply believe that economic success carries a social responsibility. Companies do not exist in a vacuum, but within a society that supports them.
social.text2: That is why we donate 10% of our annual profits to charitable and social projects, out of full conviction.
social.text3: No corporate marketing, no buzzwords — just our honest promise to help where support is needed most. That is what humanity in practice means to us.

cta.title: Ready for Better Healthcare?
cta.subtitle: Let's find out together how we can provide optimal coverage for you or your company.
